name: Bon Bon Chicken- Szechuan
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 4 cups of water to a boil in a large saucepan. Reduce heat to medium and add chicken. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes. Remove chicken and let cool. Reserve broth in the saucepan.
2. Sprinkle cucumber slices with salt and let stand for 15 minutes. Squeeze slices to remove excess water and arrange on a platter.
3. Soak bean sheets or noodles in 3 cups hot water for 5 minutes, then drain well. Bring chicken broth back to a boil.
4. Cut bean sheets into 1/2 inch widths or noodles into 4 inch lengths. Place in a large strainer and dip briefly into boiling broth (5 seconds). Drain well and arrange on top of cucumbers.
5. Cut chicken into 2 inch by 1/3 inch shreds with a cleaver. Place chicken shreds on top of noodles.
6. Sprinkle with pepper salt, garlic, and ginger.
7. Combine ingredients for Seasoning Sauce in a small bowl and mix well. Pour sauce over chicken and serve at room temperature. Toss at the table just before serving. Makes 4 servings.
SEASONING SAUCE:
1. In a medium saucepan over medium-low heat, heat oil until it sizzles when a piece of chopped pepper is dropped in. Remove from heat and let cool.
2. Add chopped peppers with seeds to hot oil. Cover and let set for 10 minutes. Stir in cayenne pepper to mix well. Cover and let stand at room temperature for 8 hours. Strain into a jar, cover, and refrigerate. Makes about 1/4 cup.
PAN SAUCE:
1. In tightly covered container.
